issues.title: Practice flow stuck — same question shown repeatedly
issues.description: The same question appeared 3+ times without the flow advancing: "כלי הכנה עצמאי לאמירנט · לא קשור לנית · ציונים אינם רשמיים"
issues.expected: Flow advances to a new question after submitting
issues.actual: Same question text appears after answering and clicking Next
issues.suggestedCause: Next button does nothing, or question selector returns same question on repeat
issues.suggestedFixArea: src/components/practice/PracticeSession.tsx, src/lib/practice/practice-engine.ts

issues.title: Repeated questions in practice — 5 duplicates out of 7 seen
issues.description: 5 question(s) appeared more than once during a single practice session. With 400+ questions in the pool, this should rarely happen.
issues.expected: Each question appears at most once in a 20-question session
issues.suggestedCause: Anti-repetition logic in question-selector.ts may not exclude already-shown questions within the same session
issues.suggestedFixArea: src/lib/practice/question-selector.ts, src/lib/practice/question-history.ts

allIssues.title: Practice flow stuck — same question shown repeatedly
allIssues.description: The same question appeared 3+ times without the flow advancing: "כלי הכנה עצמאי לאמירנט · לא קשור לנית · ציונים אינם רשמיים"
allIssues.expected: Flow advances to a new question after submitting
allIssues.actual: Same question text appears after answering and clicking Next
allIssues.suggestedCause: Next button does nothing, or question selector returns same question on repeat
allIssues.suggestedFixArea: src/components/practice/PracticeSession.tsx, src/lib/practice/practice-engine.ts

allIssues.title: Repeated questions in practice — 5 duplicates out of 7 seen
allIssues.description: 5 question(s) appeared more than once during a single practice session. With 400+ questions in the pool, this should rarely happen.
allIssues.expected: Each question appears at most once in a 20-question session
allIssues.suggestedCause: Anti-repetition logic in question-selector.ts may not exclude already-shown questions within the same session
allIssues.suggestedFixArea: src/lib/practice/question-selector.ts, src/lib/practice/question-history.ts
